title: odontites lanceolatus subsp. olotensis
intro: Odontites lanceolatus subsp. olotensis is a subspecies of the Odontites lanceolatus plant, which is a type of annual or biennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Odontites lanceolatus subsp. olotensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. The plant is often prepared in herbal tea or infusion form, and can also be used in tincture or oil preparations for topical application.
